translations.en: a girl of perhaps twelve years.
translations.zh: 一個約莫十二歲的女孩。

translations.en: She is agile, and balances trays of mugs deftly on each hand.
translations.zh: 她身手敏捷，兩手各端著一盤酒杯，靈巧地保持平衡。

translations.en: It is a wonder how she can duck the hurled debris and avoid the flying fists.
translations.zh: 實在難以置信，她竟能躲開飛來的雜物，閃過揮舞的拳頭。

translations.en: She is quick, and never spills a drop of ale.
translations.zh: 她動作飛快，從不灑落半滴麥酒。

translations.en: "Hallo, $G. Welcome to the 'Sword and @Keg.'
translations.zh: 「哈囉，$G。歡迎光臨『劍與@Keg（桶）』酒館。」

translations.en: "Sometimes 'tis rough here but I doesn't mind."
translations.zh: 「這裡有時粗野，但俺不在乎。」

translations.en: "Some day I'll be a @fighter, ye know."
translations.zh: 「有朝一日俺會成為一名@fighter（武士），汝知道的。」

translations.en: "It's Lyssandra, but ye can call me @Andy."
translations.zh: 「俺叫利珊德拉，但汝可以叫俺@Andy（安迪）。」

translations.en: "I know 'tis a boy's name, but I like it all the same."
translations.zh: 「俺知道那是個男孩的名字，但俺就是喜歡。」

translations.en: "I take orders for drinks, $G."
translations.zh: 「俺負責接受飲料訂單，$G。」

translations.en: "The fighting here usually begins over--"
translations.zh: 「這裡的打架通常是因為——」

translations.en: Her voice drops to a whisper, "--the @rat!"
translations.zh: 她壓低聲音說道：「——@rat（老鼠）！」

translations.en: "Around sunset things get really rowdy here!"
translations.zh: 「日落前後這裡會鬧得特別兇！」

translations.en: "Shhh!" She glances about to see if you have been overheard.
translations.zh: 「噓！」她四下張望，看是否有人聽到。

translations.en: "See yon hole in the north wall?"
translations.zh: 「看到北牆那個洞了嗎？」

translations.en: "Look carefully at where floor and wall meet."
translations.zh: 「仔細看地板和牆壁相接的地方。」

translations.en: "That's where it took the rune!"
translations.zh: 「就是那裡，牠把符文帶進去了！」

translations.en: "They tried all manner of tricks to get it out but they all failed."
translations.zh: 「他們試盡了各種方法想把符文弄出來，但全都失敗了。」

translations.en: "I had an @idea, but nobody listened to me."
translations.zh: 「俺有個@idea（主意），但沒人聽俺的。」

translations.en: "I know how to get it from the you-know-@what."
translations.zh: 「俺知道怎麼從那個你懂的@what（什麼）東西那裡把它弄出來。」

translations.en: "The @rat," she whispers conspiratorially to you.
translations.zh: 「@rat（老鼠），」她神秘地對汝耳語。

translations.en: "Culham has oft sung of it, with @Jerris and @Starhelm."
translations.zh: 「卡翰曾多次唱起那首歌，和@Jerris（傑里）斯、@Starhelm（史塔）赫姆一起。」

translations.en: "His real name is Stelnar."
translations.zh: 「他的真名是史塔赫姆。」

translations.en: "He would be much nicer if he were not so angry all the time."
translations.zh: 「他要是不那麼常發火，會好相處多了。」

translations.en: "He is brave when @fighting, but he is afraid to sing by himself."
translations.zh: 「他@fighting（打架）很勇敢，但自己一個人唱歌會怕。」

translations.en: "Bye-bye, $G. It was nice talking to you."
translations.zh: 「再見，$G。和汝說話很愉快。」

translations.en: "I cannot help ye with that."
translations.zh: 「俺對此幫不上汝。」

translations.en: "Do ye know of the talking mouse? Lord British's friend?"
translations.zh: 「汝知道那隻會說話的老鼠嗎？不列顛王的朋友？」

translations.en: "Well, ye would think it was a dumb idea anyways..."
translations.zh: 「反正汝也會覺得那是個蠢主意……」

translations.en: "A mouse could get the rune, of that I'm sure!"
translations.zh: 「一隻老鼠能把符文取出來，俺確定！」

translator_notes: 利珊德拉是個不羈的少女跑堂，夢想成為武士。語氣帶點孩子氣的不標準文法（'doesn't' instead of 'don't'），以「俺」自稱表現個性。她識破可用雪莉老鼠取回符文的妙計。
